title: Glitches QOL
description: The Quality Of Life Update You Didn't Know You Wanted
body:
An all-new GlitchedMastery MOD!

 

Features:

-Craft Torches With Coal Blocks
-Smelt Rotten Flesh For Leather (Works On A Campfire Too!) 
-Convert Wool Into String
-Make Leather Horse Armour With Leather And Wool
-Make A Torch With Glowstone Dust
-Make Diamond Horse Armour With Diamonds And Wool
-Make Gold Horse Armour With Gold And Wool
-Make Iron Horse Armour With Iron And Wool
-Craft A Saddle With Iron, Leather And String
-Make A Torch With Glowstone Blocks
-Make A Redstone Torch With A Redstone Block
-Make Chain Armour With Chains
-Sharpness VI
-New Paintings!
